name: Saffron Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. If using saffron thread, grind it to a coarse powder-like consistency using a mortar and pestle.
2. Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a baking sheet.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
